---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new page, view, or capability for KubeXEye
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**What problem does this solve?**
Describe the gap — e.g. a resource type or workflow that isn't visible/supported today.

**Proposed solution**
What you'd like to see. If it's a new resource-type page or feature page, note which existing page
it's closest to (this project has a documented pattern for both — see
[doc/adding-resources.md](../../doc/adding-resources.md) and
[CONTRIBUTING.md](../../CONTRIBUTING.md#adding-a-new-standalone-feature-page-not-tied-to-one-resource-type)).

**Alternatives considered**
Any other approaches you thought about.

**Additional context**
Mockups, links to relevant Kubernetes API docs, etc.
